title: Lealinga Snorkel Set Adults 2Pack, Snorkel Mask Anti-Fog Panoramic View Diving Mask Dry Top Snorkel Kit with Travel Bag Diving Set for Snorkeling Scuba Diving Swimming Travel
features: CLEAR PANORAMIC SNORKEL MASK: The snorkeling mask is equipped with an anti-fog film to prevent the lenses from fogging when the nose exhales. The impact-resistant tempered glass can well withstand deep water pressure and provide protection. Safety comes first

COMFY FIT LEAK PROOF SKIRT: The soft silicone material of scuba mask skirt provide a comfortable fit. The adjustable headband allows the diving mask to be fitted well to the contours of the face, providing a better seal without leaving traces on the face. Nose bags prevent water from accidentally entering the nose

DRY TOP ANTI-SPLASH DESIGN: Snorkel set adult is equipped with a one-way inhalation valve and a moving floating ball on the top. Once the tube goes underwater, the tube entrance will be closed by the floating ball. The fixing buckle on it help to attach it with swim mask, you can enjoy unobstructed breathing while diving underwater

FOOD GRADE MOUTHPIECE: The mouthpiece of the snorkel is ergonomically designed and made of food-grade high-quality silicone, non-toxic and odorless. Your mouth will still feel comfortable even after long time use

SNORKEL AND MASK SET FOR EVERY SNORKELING LOVERS: The snorkel mask + snorkel combo is a most common snorkeling gear for adults. Mask and snorkel set together for snorkeling and diving, separately mask can be used for swimming. Additionally, high quality material is used to manufacture the snorkeling set so that it can be durable enough and you can get the most value out of your snorkel kit
